examples.title: Producer-Consumer with Threads
examples.code:
SEMAPHORE mutex = 1
SEMAPHORE full = 0
SEMAPHORE empty = BUFFER_SIZE

Producer Thread:
  loop:
    produce item
    wait(empty)
    wait(mutex)
    add to buffer
    signal(mutex)
    signal(full)

Consumer Thread:
  loop:
    wait(full)
    wait(mutex)
    remove item
    signal(mutex)
    signal(empty)
    consume item
examples.explanation: Uses semaphores to manage buffer access and prevent overflow/underflow
